atoms.semantic_claim: The reth-chain-state crate depends on the local ritual-blocking-pubsub crate so chain-state code can link blocking canonical-state pubsub support.

destinations.snippet:
[dependencies]
# reth
reth-chainspec.workspace = true
reth-errors.workspace = true
reth-execution-types.workspace = true
reth-metrics.workspace = true
reth-ethereum-primitives.workspace = true
reth-primitives-traits = { workspace = true, features = ["dashmap"] }
reth-storage-api.workspace = true
reth-trie.workspace = true
ritual-blocking-pubsub.workspace = true

The workspace dependency resolves to the destination local ritual-blocking-pubsub crate.
